name: @saas/llm-guard
description: Shared LLM governance primitives: tenant-scoped daily/monthly token cost guard (Firestore + Supabase adapters), overage alerting, common Claude model ID constants, and a silent-model-degradation guard. Consolidates the three independent implementations that emerged from 30_Knowledge/errors/claude_api_user_cost_limit_missing.md (gov-doc-engine, aria-for-salon-app, ai-business-navigator) into one package so new callers don't reinvent it.
